3165130.name: SLIME ORDER
3165130.description:
Guide the colorful slime to the goal.
All you have to do is decide the order and timing of the slimes.
If even one person reaches the goal, the stage is cleared.
There are 50 stages in total! A casual puzzle game.

Red slime...When it becomes a block, it stays in place!
Blue slime...can jump over high steps! When it becomes a block, it becomes a jumping platform!
Green slime... it falls when it becomes a block!
Yellow slime...it floats on the edge of the cliff! Even if it becomes a block, it will float!

On the play screen, you can "retry", "fast forward", and "pause", and from the pause screen, you can "pass the stage" and "adjust the volume".
